nasb.text: saying, “Give this authority to me as well, so that everyone on whom I lay my hands may receive the Holy Spirit.”

esv.text: saying, “Give me this power also, so that anyone on whom I lay my hands may receive the Holy Spirit.”

cnv.text: 說：“請把這權柄也給我，叫我為誰按手，誰就可以受聖靈。”

ccb.text: 说：“请把这能力也给我吧，以便我把手按在谁身上，就使谁领受圣灵。”

csbs.text: 说：“请把这权柄也给我，使我按手在谁身上，谁就可以领受圣灵。”
